title: Netflix Clone
description: A full-stack Netflix clone with Next.js, MongoDB, NextAuth, and TMDB API. Features user authentication, watchlist, and dynamic movie data.

title: E-Commerce Platform
description: A modern e-commerce platform with product management, cart, Stripe payments, and an admin dashboard. Built with React and Node.js.

title: Task Manager App
description: A productivity-focused task management app with drag-and-drop boards, priority labels, deadlines, and team collaboration features.

title: Weather Dashboard
description: A real-time weather dashboard with 7-day forecasts, location search, and interactive charts using OpenWeather API.

title: Portfolio Website
description: This very portfolio — a full-stack animated portfolio website built with Next.js, Framer Motion, and a Node.js contact backend.

title: Chat Application
description: A real-time chat application with rooms, private messages, and emoji support. Built with Socket.IO and Express.
